verdict_reason: One Major finding: amend_shouldPassTraceIdAsCorrelationId test lacks response body assertions to verify behaviour, only verifies service method was called.

todos.issue: Test amend_shouldPassTraceIdAsCorrelationId only verifies the service was called; it lacks assertions on the response body to verify behaviour
